description: uix plugin hooks. Auto-activates on first session in any project (no manual init). SessionStart scaffolds .uix-config.md from a template and scans for design assets (design/, mockups/, *.fig, *.sketch, ...). The other three hooks then provide UI-prompt detection (incl. 'implement this design'-style phrases), component-reuse reminders before frontend writes, and a fast rule-based validator after writes so bottlenecks surface immediately. Set `enabled: false` in .uix-config.md to opt out per project.
